vibe: Midweek drift — shoegaze haze, dusty beats, deep house warmth, and ambient Japanese minimalism

tracks.name: When the Sun Hits
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Talk Talk's dreamy post-punk — wall-of-sound shoegaze at its finest

tracks.name: Accordion
tracks.reason: MF DOOM x Madlib — abstract hip-hop adjacent to Nujabes' jazz-rap sensibility

tracks.name: Dream
tracks.reason: Delicate ambient from the master — connects to Brian Eno listening and Japanese ambient taste

tracks.name: Midas
tracks.reason: Warm electronica with live instrumentation — bridges the gap between FKJ and deeper house

tracks.name: Song for My Father
tracks.reason: Spiritual jazz flute over broken beat — adjacent to Yussef Dayes' jazz-electronic crossover

tracks.name: Feel My Thoughts - Bruh
tracks.reason: Cosmic deep house with jazz keys — spiritual successor to Kerri Chandler/Chris Stussy vibes

tracks.name: Actually
tracks.reason: Jordan Rakei's house alias — warm, soulful dance music with live instrumentation

tracks.name: You're Alive - There's Still Time
tracks.reason: West London broken beat — connects Kaidi Tatham's world to something fresh

tracks.name: Echoes Of The Past
tracks.reason: Japanese ambient-house pioneer — early tape experiments bridging ambient and deep house

tracks.name: Black Milk
tracks.reason: Dark trip-hop — adjacent to Sneaker Pimps and the moody electronic side of recent plays
